./recipes/Honey Banana Milk Mix.txt.content:
Honey Banana Milk Mix

Ingredients: banana, milk, honey

Preparation text:
Slice the banana, add it to the milk with honey, then mix until combined.

./recipes/Chocolate Cream Sugar Whisk.tx.content:
Chocolate Cream Sugar Whisk

Ingredients: chocolate, cream, sugar (granulated)

Preparation text:
Add chocolate and sugar to the cream and whisk until smooth.

./recipes/Avocado Cucumber Dressing Bowl.content:
Avocado Cucumber Dressing Bowl

Ingredients: avocado, cucumber, dressing, table salt

Preparation text:
Cube the avocado, slice the cucumber, add dressing and salt, then mix gently.

./recipes/Apple Almond Honey Mix.txt.content:
Apple Almond Honey Mix

Ingredients: apple, almond, honey

Preparation text:
Dice the apple and chop the almond. Add the apple, almond and honey to a bowl. Mix them until everything is evenly coated.

./recipes/Tomato Olive Vinegar Mix.txt.content:
Tomato Olive Vinegar Mix

Ingredients: tomato, olive, vinegar, table salt

Preparation text:
Dice the tomato, slice the olive, add vinegar and salt, then mix well.

./recipes/Pineapple Coconut Smoothie.txt.content:
Pineapple Coconut Smoothie

Ingredients: pineapple, coconut, smoothie

Preparation text:
Cube the pineapple, chop the coconut, add both to the smoothie, and mix thoroughly.

./recipes/Strawberry Citrus Juice Blend..content:
Strawberry Citrus Juice Blend

Ingredients: strawberry, orange, lemon, juice beverage

Preparation text:
Slice the strawberry, halve the orange and lemon, add everything to the juice beverage, and mix.

./recipes/Peach Banana Syrup Bowl.txt.content:
Peach Banana Syrup Bowl

Ingredients: peach, banana, syrup

Preparation text:
Slice the peach and banana, add syrup, and mix to combine.
